name: Zero Risk — Agent Outcomes Stream Writer (Webhook)
description: Called at completion of every /api/agents/run invocation. Receives { agent_slug, task_id, input, output, tokens_used, latency_ms, success, error }. Normalizes and writes to agent_outcomes Supabase table for meta-learning feedback loop. If success=false, triggers failed-pipeline-escalation. Emits metrics to PostHog for real-time monitoring. Updates agent performance aggregates. Fast (<100ms round-trip), fire-and-forget.
trigger: Webhook POST /webhook/outcomes-writer with agent execution result

supabase_tables: agent_outcomes (agent_slug, task_id, input, output, tokens_used, latency_ms, success, error, created_at)
